name: Mike Del Preto
description_short: Mike Del Preto is an SVP mortgage lender (NMLS #230942) at A & N Mortgage Services offering home purchase, refinance, and debt consolidation loans with an educational-first approach.
description_long:
Mike Del Preto has operated in mortgage lending since 2005, building his practice on client education and personalized service. He holds the title of Senior Vice President of Mortgage Lending and maintains NMLS licensure (#230942). His business operates under A & N Mortgage Services, Inc., with an online presence at delpretomortgage.com and direct contact via (312) 488-0552.

Del Preto's core offerings include home purchase loans for first-time and repeat buyers, home refinancing to lower rates or access equity, and debt consolidation mortgages. His marketing emphasizes an educational process designed to help borrowers understand their options before committing. The website highlights three primary loan types with dedicated application pathways, suggesting streamlined origination for qualified borrowers.

The practice differentiates itself through what Del Preto calls "The Del Preto Difference," centered on education empowering buyers and exceptional service regardless of loan volume. This is supported by a 4.9-star rating across 352+ Google reviews, demonstrating consistent client satisfaction. Del Preto maintains an active YouTube channel with educational content targeting both consumers (first-time buyers, rate strategy) and real estate professionals (agent tips, market forecasts), positioning his brand as thought leadership in the Chicago mortgage market.

A meaningful caveat: while the website emphasizes education and low rates, there is no transparent rate comparison, fee schedules, or independent verification of claimed advantages. The company's value proposition rests heavily on Del Preto's personal reputation and review aggregate rather than objective product differentiation. Borrowers should verify rates and terms independently against competitors before proceeding.
pros: 4.9-star Google rating across 352+ verified reviews demonstrating sustained client satisfaction
NMLS-licensed individual (NMLS #230942) with 20+ years of mortgage industry experience since 2005
Educational content strategy including dedicated YouTube channel with market insights and buyer guides
Multiple loan product offerings: home purchase, refinance, and debt consolidation mortgages
Direct personal contact with SVP-level loan officer rather than call center model
Emphasizes treating clients like family and providing consistent service regardless of client volume
Accessible via phone/text (312) 488-0552 for same-day consultation
cons: Website provides no rate quotes, fee schedules, or competitive pricing transparency for comparison
No information about loan approval timelines, processing speed, or service level agreements
Limited detail on credit requirements, loan amount ranges, or approval criteria for different borrower profiles
Educational approach, while marketed as strength, may indicate longer consultation process vs. streamlined lenders
Geographic service area not clearly defined; unclear if services extend beyond Illinois/Chicago market
best_for: First-time home buyers seeking personalized education before purchasing their first property
Homeowners with existing mortgages interested in refinancing with a relationship-based lender
Borrowers who value explanatory guidance and understand their loan terms before closing
diagnosis: Best for borrowers in the Chicago area who value education and personal service from an established loan officer, and who are willing to engage in detailed consultation rather than seeking quick digital-only processing. Main caveat: lack of transparent rate and fee information online makes independent comparison difficult; serious applicants should request quotes from 3+ lenders including Del Preto before deciding.
services: Home purchase mortgages for primary residences
Investment property financing and purchase loans
Debt consolidation mortgages using home equity
Educational consultation calls or Zoom meetings
YouTube educational content on buyer strategy and market trends
Real estate professional partnership and training resources
Phone/text-based direct access to loan officer
meta_description: Mike Del Preto is an SVP mortgage lender (NMLS #230942) offering home purchase, refinance, and debt consolidation loans.
